span.p:
W0 · Classify
Designer — classify-game
physics-first archetype
+ core loop + scope-cut

div.style: color: rgb(11, 42, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
W1 · Spec
Designer — write-gdd
slim GDD + 2–5 milestones,
each with runtime assertions

div.style: color: rgb(6, 78, 31) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
W2 · Scaffold
Coder — scaffold
copy template → empty green
build + expose __GAME__ hook

div.style: color: rgb(88, 28, 135) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
W3 · Assets
Artist — assets
fill asset slots
(placeholder-first)

div.style: color: rgb(6, 78, 31) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
W4 · Implement
Coder — implement-milestone
build slice green;
populate __GAME__ for real

div.style: color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
W5 · Verify + Fix
Playtester — verify
headless assert vs __GAME__
